name: Haber Otomasyonu

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '*/30 * * * *' # 30 dakikada bir çalışır
  workflow_dispatch: 

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.10'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pip install feedparser firebase-admin requests beautifulsoup4
      - name: Create JSON file
        run: echo "${{ secrets.FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS }}" > serviceAccountKey.json
      - name: Run bot
        run: python bot.py
